summary: Submit a user-generated problem report for a particular trip.

parameters.name: serviceDate
parameters.description: The service date of the trip

parameters.name: vehicleID
parameters.description: The vehicle actively serving the trip

parameters.name: stopID
parameters.description: A stop ID indicating where the user is experiencing the problem

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: A string code identifying the nature of the problem

parameters.name: userComment
parameters.description: Additional comment text supplied by the user describing the problem

parameters.name: userOnVehicle
parameters.description: Indicator if the user is on the transit vehicle experiencing the problem

parameters.name: userVehicleNumber
parameters.description: The vehicle number, as reported by the user

parameters.name: userLocationAccuracy
parameters.description: The reporting user’s location accuracy, in meters
